scripts.test:e2e:prod: node -e "process.env.TEST_ENV='prod'; process.env.MVP_GOOGLE_SUBMIT_MODE='real'; const { spawnSync } = require('node:child_process'); const result = spawnSync(process.platform === 'win32' ? 'cmd' : 'npx', process.platform === 'win32' ? ['/c', 'npx', 'playwright', 'test', 'tests/e2e/marketing-mvp.prod-smoke.spec.js', '--project=chromium'] : ['playwright', 'test', 'tests/e2e/marketing-mvp.prod-smoke.spec.js', '--project=chromium'], { stdio: 'inherit', env: process.env }); process.exit(result.status ?? 1);"
scripts.test:all: npm run test:unit && npm run test:e2e:mvp
